raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Immediately flush eye with clean, lukewarm water or saline for at least 15-20 minutes.
STEP 2: Hold eyelids open and move eye in all directions during rinsing.
STEP 3: Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.
DO NOT: Rub the eye or use neutralizing agents.
ESCALATE: Seek immediate medical attention; bring the product label or SDS.

immediate_steps: Immediately flush eye with clean, lukewarm water or saline for at least 15-20 minutes.
Hold eyelids open and move eye in all directions during rinsing.
Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.
do_not_do: Rub the eye or use neutralizing agents.
escalate_when: Seek immediate medical attention; bring the product label or SDS.
